name: Chocolate No Bake Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the butter, sugar, water, and cocoa powder in a bowl until well combined.
2. Heat the mixture over low heat for about 30 seconds or until it comes to a boil.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the peanut butter.
4. Add the oatmeal (or coconut) and gently mix until well incorporated.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper.
6. Allow the cookies to cool and harden completely before serving.
